title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned about AI self-improvement risks, noting that Claude is now writing and reviewing code, running experiments, and accelerating AI system development. OpenAI shares similar concerns about this trend, and the competitive race may be accelerating faster than anticipated.
